_meta.scenario: Chaos-lab agents tagged agent_version='dev' MUST NOT pollute the production fleet dashboard. The SQL filter (agent_version IS NULL OR agent_version != 'dev') excludes them at fetch time, so the fixture's fetch result is empty even when chaos-lab agents are silent. Demonstrates the doctrine that real customer agents are never tagged 'dev'.
_meta.captured: 2026-04-30 round-table fleet-edge liveness slice (synthetic; modeled after the 4 chaos-lab agents observed at status='connected' 7+ days post-iMac-poweroff).
